summary: This document analyzes the gap between the current platform state and the target objectives defined in the ECOS Transition Roadmap. --- - Evolution is primarily Git-branch-centric. - "BranchVariant" is the primary unit of exploration. - Lineage is tracked as a secondary attribute (`IterationRecord`, `Trajectory`). - Surviving artifacts are "merged" rather than "inherited" in the persistent model. - "SurvivingLineage" is the primary persistent cognitive structure. - Artifacts are descendants of surviving ancestors. - Branches are temporary execution artifacts only. - The platform operates on artifact-agnostic lineages. - **Structural**: Unit of evolution needs shifting from Branch to Lineage. - **Persistence**: Change from branch-history to lineage-history as primary storage. --- - `IterationManager` contains explicit references to Git, Maven, and code-specific agents. - Mode-specific logic (`if(isMediated)`) exists in core controllers. - Kernel is artifact-agnostic. - Environment-specific logic is injected via strategies/adapters. - No mode-specific shortcuts. - **Orchestration**: Specialized logic must be moved to environments/strategies. - **API**: Introduction of artifact and environment abstractions.
